(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b3 on table, b4 on b3
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b5 on table, b6 on b5
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 9): b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on b9, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on table, now on b2)
      (on b1 b2)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 was on table alone, stays on table (no change needed for single block)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (was on table, now on b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on-table b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b5 on top (was on table, now on b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on-table b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b7 on top (was on table, now on b8, b8 on b9, ..., b15 on table)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on-table b15)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b3 on table, b4 on b3
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 4): b8 on table, b9 on b8, b10 on b9, b11 on b10
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 6): b12 on table, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15, b17 on b16
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (clear b17)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (was on bottom)

      (on b5 b6)

      (clear b5)

      (on b14 b15)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b16 b17)
      (clear b12)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects 
    b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18
  )
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b3 on table, b4 on b3
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 5): b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7, b9 on b8
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 9): b10 on table, b11 on b10, ..., b18 on b17
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (single block, no change needed but still true)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (single block, no change needed but still true)
      (clear b2)
      (on-table b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top, b4 on table
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b5 on top, b9 on table
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b10 on top, b18 on table
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
